---
title: "Can LLMs Extract Useful Data from News
Articles for Police Accountability?"
description: 'Poster'
author: "Jesse Loi, Ariana Mendible"
date: "5/29/2026"
categories: [LLM, complaints, publications]
image: hist_comparison.png
page-layout: full
freeze: false
---

The following poster was presented by Jesse Loi at the [Seattle Univeristy Student Research and Creativity Conference](https://srcconprogram.my.canva.site/srccon-conference-2026). 

```{=html}
<iframe src="SRRCon_Poster.pdf" 
        width="100%" 
        height="100%">
</iframe>
```
